color_system.description: Modern SaaS (Linear/Vercel energy). Replaces the warm parchment for stark, high-contrast zincs and one electric accent. Light shell only.

typography.stack: Geist (Headings/Body) + Geist Mono (Kickers/Data). Replaces Inter/Manrope stack for a crisp, startup-friendly feel.

portfolio_blueprint.description: Stripped back, minimal, breathable layout replacing the dense KPI strips.
portfolio_blueprint.header: Massive typographic statement. H2 for 'Portfolio Value' with a large elegant number and a simple green pill next to it for +YTD growth.
cards_to_keep: Aggregate Position card (redesigned as minimal inline bento row)
portfolio_blueprint.layout: Grid with massive negative space (gap-8 or gap-12). Assets move to wide tabular 'List View' or ultra-clean cards (large image, bold title, 2 metrics: Value, Cap Rate).
portfolio_blueprint.hover_motion: Minimal lift. Card's 1px border changes to --vela-accent-main over 0.15s ease-in-out. No heavy drop shadows.

market_trends_pattern.indicator_placement: Top right of the section header.
market_trends_pattern.indicator_design: Subtle, pulsing 6px dot (--vela-status-success) next to a Geist Mono timestamp: 'LIVE · updated 12s ago'.
market_trends_pattern.manual_refresh: Minimalist icon-only button (lucide-react RotateCw) beside the timestamp, spins on click.
market_trends_pattern.motion: New headlines slide down gracefully (framer-motion initial={{height:0, opacity:0}}). Subtle background flash (--vela-accent-muted to white over 1.5s) to draw the eye gently.

left_path.title: Identify high-yield opportunities.
left_path.supporting: AI-driven market screening and deterministic financial modeling to validate your next move.

right_path.title: Maximize existing portfolio value.
right_path.supporting: Uncover hidden operational inefficiencies and reposition assets with data-backed market signals.

general_guidelines.spacing: Generous. Use Tailwind p-8, p-12. Avoid centered-card-grids-with-equal-spacing, favor asymmetry.
general_guidelines.testing: All interactive/key elements MUST use data-testid attributes.
